subject: A hooded woman in agony, eyes clenched shut, mouth open in a strained scream or grimace, head tilted back as if her thoughts are being forcibly extracted
description: A close-up portrait of a dark-haired woman shrouded in a black hood or cloak, her face contorted in pain. Her eyes are squeezed shut, brows knit, and her mouth is open in what reads as a scream, grimace, or anguished gasp. Strands of dark hair fall across her forehead. The lighting is harsh and high-contrast, modeling her features with deep shadows along the jaw, neck, and the recesses of the hood. The background is a near-uniform black void, isolating the figure and amplifying the sense of psychic violation. The palette is dominated by inky blacks, cold flesh tones, and a faint sickly green-grey wash in the highlights, consistent with black-aligned mental coercion imagery.
foreground: hooded woman, head and shoulders, anguished expression
background: near-black void with faint atmospheric gradient
emotion: agony, mental violation, forced confession; mouth wide in a scream, eyes clenched, head tilted back
